# discord_forum_post (Resource)

Manages a post (a thread with a starting message) in a forum or media channel — for a fixed, declarative post such as a pinned info or guidelines thread. This is the only resource that manages message content; the bot needs `Read Message History` to refresh the content.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# A fixed, declarative post in a forum (or media) channel — e.g. a pinned
# guidelines / info post that should always be at the top of the forum.
resource "discord_forum_post" "guidelines" {
  channel_id = "123456789012345678" # a discord_forum_channel id
  name       = "📌 Read me first"
  content    = "Welcome! Please read the guidelines before opening a post."
  pinned     = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `channel_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the forum or media channel.
- `content` (String) Body of the starting message.
- `name` (String) Post title (the thread name).

### Optional

- `archived` (Boolean) Whether the post is archived.
- `auto_archive_duration` (Number) Minutes of inactivity before the post is archived (60, 1440, 4320 or 10080).
- `locked` (Boolean) Whether the post is locked.
- `pinned` (Boolean) Whether the post is pinned in the forum.
- `rate_limit_per_user` (Number) Slowmode in seconds within the post.
- `tags` (Set of String) Snowflake IDs of the forum tags applied to the post.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Snowflake ID of the post (its thread, and starting message).
